title: Ender Relay
description: Adds new teleport block for end dimension
body:
# Ender Relay Mod

Introducing the Ender Relay block! This block offers lodestone warp system unique for end dimension
![Ender Relay isometric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66374b43d7a12ac34759ec86014c7d2e17758957.png)

## Craft recipe
Craft block using 4 obsidian, 4 popped chorus and compass connected to lodestone in end dimension. 

![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21662c966197971ff1281ee60475f47153893f80.png)

## Credits
- Mod Concept: Kenadian
   [(Original Video)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L1i4izl25V4)
- Block Texture: 
   [Kint](https://kintart.carrd.co/)
- Mod Commissioned by: Lord Zereph
